extracted_claims: Announcement effects are strongest when the surprise component is large.
53b9ae01-7580-408b-94b0-2a8ee680e242.methodology_summary: Event-study style measurement around announcement dates.
53b9ae01-7580-408b-94b0-2a8ee680e242.relevance_to_hypothesis: Relevant if the hypothesis is framed around CPI prints, labor releases, or other event windows.
53b9ae01-7580-408b-94b0-2a8ee680e242.summary: Event-style reactions to macro releases exist, but persistence and sign can vary with the prevailing regime and expectations backdrop.
53b9ae01-7580-408b-94b0-2a8ee680e242.title: Macro announcement effects are short horizon and noisy across regimes

extracted_claims: Real-rate moves can affect valuation-sensitive sectors more than the broad market.
637f491d-88c3-4366-91b9-6b9f113366d2.methodology_summary: Empirical macro-finance framing using historical yield and asset-return relationships.
637f491d-88c3-4366-91b9-6b9f113366d2.relevance_to_hypothesis: Directly relevant to Investigate semis versus defensives..
637f491d-88c3-4366-91b9-6b9f113366d2.summary: Falling real yields tend to support duration-sensitive equity segments, though the effect is regime-dependent.
637f491d-88c3-4366-91b9-6b9f113366d2.title: Real-rate sensitivity of long-duration assets

extracted_claims: Macro interpretation matters as much as the raw data direction.
f474a717-fe5f-41fa-acbe-568c68cf5dd1.methodology_summary: Cross-market commentary supported by historical sector-relative performance comparisons.
f474a717-fe5f-41fa-acbe-568c68cf5dd1.relevance_to_hypothesis: Useful counterweight because it highlights conditional interpretation rather than a one-way macro rule.
f474a717-fe5f-41fa-acbe-568c68cf5dd1.source: Sell-side or public market strategy research
f474a717-fe5f-41fa-acbe-568c68cf5dd1.summary: Cooling inflation alone is often insufficient; growth-sensitive outperformance depends on whether the market reads the move as benign easing rather than growth deterioration.
f474a717-fe5f-41fa-acbe-568c68cf5dd1.title: Sector rotation depends on growth expectations as well as inflation cooling

83077f2b-1fb0-4af2-a636-a8d3c3ee4f8c.label: primary
83077f2b-1fb0-4af2-a636-a8d3c3ee4f8c.mechanism: Changes in macro expectations alter discount rates and sector-relative earnings expectations.
83077f2b-1fb0-4af2-a636-a8d3c3ee4f8c.novelty_usefulness_note: Good default card for a first-pass quant investigation.
83077f2b-1fb0-4af2-a636-a8d3c3ee4f8c.thesis: Investigate semis versus defensives. through a measurable macro-to-market transmission channel.
83077f2b-1fb0-4af2-a636-a8d3c3ee4f8c.title: Primary macro transmission

c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.expected_direction: defensives outperform when the macro signal is interpreted as growth-negative
c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.label: counterfactual
c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.mechanism: Investors may interpret the macro signal as slower growth rather than lower discount rates.
c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.novelty_usefulness_note: Useful falsification card that forces clearer interpretation.
c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.thesis: If the primary thesis is wrong, defensive sectors should benefit more than growth-sensitive assets under the same macro shift.
c3ee0d14-16fb-4b2e-bb84-67a014982093.title: Counterfactual defensive rotation

f461dd2e-722c-43d6-a440-c274e0287afe.label: regime
f461dd2e-722c-43d6-a440-c274e0287afe.mechanism: Transmission strength changes when inflation, policy, or recession risk dominates the narrative.
f461dd2e-722c-43d6-a440-c274e0287afe.novelty_usefulness_note: High usefulness for separating unconditional noise from conditional signal.
f461dd2e-722c-43d6-a440-c274e0287afe.thesis: The relationship should be stronger in specific macro regimes than in unconditional full-sample analysis.
f461dd2e-722c-43d6-a440-c274e0287afe.title: Regime-conditional sensitivity
